sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11773" key="a)/peistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄπειστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πείθω</etym>) <sense id="n11773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not to be persuaded,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς δωροδοκίαν</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hyp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Dem.Fr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
